/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/core/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/entities/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/entities/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/input/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/rendering/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/rendering/TextureManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/world/Map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycaster.dir/src/world/Raycaster.cpp.o -o raycaster  -lGL -lGLU -lglut
